title: xiigen.i18n-translation.resolution-requested.v1
description: Synthesized inbound event for GET /api/translations/:moduleId/:locale. Captured by T666 TranslationResolverService at the start of the 5-step pipeline (Decision 2). Terminal on either translation-complete or policy-denied; CF-812 guarantees HTTP 200.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale requested by the client, e.g. 'he', 'fr', 'fr-FR'.

sourceKeysB64.description: Optional base64-encoded JSON array of English key names from the client's bundled English file. Used by the pipeline to compute marketplace delta without a separate lookup (Decision 2, Step 4).
